---
title: "Appendix — Bibliography"
nocite: |
  @*
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <meta http-equiv="Cache-Control" content="no-cache, no-store, must-revalidate">
        <meta http-equiv="Pragma" content="no-cache">
        <meta http-equiv="Expires" content="0">
---

Canonical source metadata lives in [`data/bibliography.yaml`](https://github.com/nvavrock/medallion/blob/main/data/bibliography.yaml). In research prose, cite with Pandoc syntax: `[@key]`.

::: {.callout-tip}
## Berkeley obituary (Berlekamp)

The live article is the [April 18, 2019 UC Berkeley News obituary](https://news.berkeley.edu/2019/04/18/elwyn-berlekamp-game-theorist-and-coding-pioneer-dies-at-78/){target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"}. Use that link (or the matching URL under **News, U. B. (2019)** below). If you still see “Page Not Found”, hard-refresh this page (Ctrl+Shift+R) or open the link in a private window.
:::

::: {#refs}
:::
